coachAM: Your consistent "procrastination, laziness" entries coupled with critical habit failures like Sleep Protocol, Training, and Sovereign Morning reveal a foundational breakdown: you're not just missing behaviors, you're actively choosing comfort and distraction over the rigorous self-discipline required to anchor your days before the world demands anything from you. The root cause is a profound lack of self-governance in the early hours, which bleeds into every other area, eroding the spiritual and physical readiness essential for elite-level execution and ultimately sabotaging your stated desire to "be the best worker, the best seller." Tonight, at 9:30 PM, physically place your phone in a separate room, away from your bed, ensuring zero access until your Sovereign Morning is complete.
